output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q92717 wdt:P125 ?edition .
  ?edition wdt:P585 ?season .
  ?edition wdt:P1042 ?winner .
  ?winner p:P122 ?leagueStatement .
  ?leagueStatement ps:P122 ?league .
  ?leagueStatement pq:P585 ?leagueSeason .
  BIND(SUBSTR(STR(?season) , 1 , 4) AS ?seasonYear)
  BIND(SUBSTR(STR(?leagueSeason) , 1 , 4) AS ?leagueYear)
  FILTER(?seasonYear = ?leagueYear)
  FILTER(?seasonYear < "1992")
  FILTER(?league != wd:Q4772832)
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?seasonYear)
LIMIT 1
